lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.

This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, truly showroom quality. The exterior paint is flawless, with no scratches, stone chips, or dings to be found. Inside, the cabin is pristine; the upholstery shows zero wear and all interior components function perfectly. It has been meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled garage. This is a rare find for a buyer seeking a vehicle in near-factory condition.
The car is in good condition. It has minor cosmetic wear on the exterior and interior. All mechanical systems are fully functional and it has been well-maintained.

Looking for a reliable and well-maintained ride? This car is in good condition and ready for its next owner! It has been consistently cared for and offers a solid, dependable performance on the road. While you might find some minor, honest signs of use, it remains a fantastic vehicle that still has plenty of great miles ahead. A wonderful choice for anyone seeking quality and value!
This vehicle is in mint condition. The interior and exterior show no signs of wear. All mechanical and electrical systems are fully functional and in perfect condition.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a reliable option for those looking for a functional daily driver. The exterior shows some age with noticeable scratches on the passenger side doors and some minor paint fading on the trunk lid. Inside, the cabin is clean but shows typical wear and tear, including some fraying on the driver's seat bolster and a non-functional auxiliary port. Mechanically, the car is sound and starts up without issue, though it may require a routine service soon as the brake pads are nearing the end of their life. It is a straightforward, dependable car for anyone needing basic transportation.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure peak performance and long-term reliability. With a clean service history and refined interior finishes, it offers a sophisticated driving experience for the discerning buyer seeking a balance of quality and value.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been well-loved, making it the perfect reliable companion for your daily commutes or weekend getaways. It runs smoothly and looks great, just waiting for its next adventure with a new owner. Come take it for a spin—you’re going to love how it handles!

This E46 chassis features the legendary S54B32 power plant, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies. The high-revving straight-six is paired with a Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a variable M differential lock for optimal torque distribution. Critical preventative maintenance has been addressed, including a comprehensive Vanos overhaul and rear subframe reinforcement to ensure structural integrity under high lateral loads. The suspension geometry remains true to its motorsport heritage, utilizing a MacPherson strut front and
Used vehicle. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Runs well.

This well-maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between performance and value. The exterior shines with its original paint, showing only minor road wear consistent with careful use. Inside, the cabin remains clean and smoke-free, featuring leather upholstery that has been regularly conditioned. Mechanically, the car is solid; it has a complete service history, a smooth-shifting transmission, and tires with plenty of tread remaining. All electronics, including the infotainment and climate control, function as they should. It’s a reliable, attractive daily driver that has been kept in a garage and treated with respect. Ready for its next owner to drive away with confidence.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies reliability and sophisticated engineering. This unit has been subjected to a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Featuring a well-preserved interior and a robust powertrain, this offering represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver seeking exceptional value without compromise.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, which exemplifies a superior balance of performance and long-term reliability. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection, this unit remains in commendable mechanical and aesthetic order, ensuring a premium driving experience. This represents an exceptional opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a high-caliber vehicle that delivers both prestige and proven value.

Hey there! I’m selling my trusty car and it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape, super reliable, and has been well-loved over the years. It's perfect for someone looking for a dependable ride that still looks great on the road. Come take it for a spin—I'm sure you’re going to love how it handles!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies. Recent preventative maintenance includes a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and rear subframe reinforcement, ensuring structural integrity under high lateral G-loads. The Getrag 6-speed manual transmission provides crisp engagement, paired with a factory limited-slip differential for optimal torque vectoring. Equipped with an upgraded coilover setup for improved damping response and reduced unsprung mass, this chassis remains balanced and communicative. The exterior shows honest wear consistent with its age, but the powertrain remains robust and ready for spirited driving.
Reliable vehicle. Good condition. Minimal exterior scuffs. Clean interior. Regular oil changes. All systems operational.

Experience the perfect blend of reliability and style with this exceptionally well-cared-for vehicle. The exterior boasts a vibrant finish that catches the light beautifully, showing only the minor, honest character marks one would expect from a car that has been loved and driven. Step inside to a pristine, non-smoking interior where every button, dial, and feature functions exactly as intended. Under the hood, the engine is responsive and quiet, benefiting from a rigorous maintenance schedule and a recent comprehensive service. The tires have excellent tread remaining, and the brakes provide firm, confident stopping power. This is a solid, dependable choice for anyone seeking a high-quality pre-owned car that looks great and performs even better on the open road.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This unit has undergone a comprehensive inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for performance and safety. Offering a refined driving experience and a well-preserved interior, this vehicle represents a premier choice for those seeking reliability and value without compromise.

Presenting a vehicle of distinguished caliber, meticulously maintained to ensure peak mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This unit offers a refined driving experience, characterized by its responsive handling and well-preserved interior appointments. It represents a premier selection for the discerning professional seeking a sophisticated balance of performance and enduring value.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, she’s still got so much life left in her! It’s been super well-loved and is in really solid shape—perfect for someone who wants a reliable, great-looking car without the brand-new price tag. It drives like a dream and is ready for its next adventure. Come take it for a spin!
Used car. Condition: good.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean interior. Minor exterior scratches. Reliable engine.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a fantastic balance of performance and comfort, making it an ideal choice for a discerning driver. The exterior showcases a vibrant, glossy finish that has been regularly waxed, with only minor, negligible surface marks consistent with careful ownership. Inside, the smoke-free cabin remains remarkably clean; the upholstery is supple with minimal wear on the driver’s side bolster, and all interior electronics—including the high-fidelity sound system and navigation—function perfectly. Mechanically, the car is in robust health, benefiting from a documented history of on-time oil changes and a recent multi-point inspection that confirmed the engine and transmission are operating smoothly. With tires showing significant tread and brakes that respond crisply, this car provides a confident and quiet ride. It is a reliable, turn-key example that has clearly been cared for throughout its life.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a distinguished opportunity for the discerning motorist. Combining robust mechanical integrity with a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers an exemplary driving experience that balances sophistication and reliable performance. Every component has been vetted to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for quality and long-term roadworthiness.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents an exceptional opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers reliable performance paired with a refined driving experience. A premier selection for those seeking a high-caliber automobile that balances sophisticated engineering with proven durability.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that’s ready for your next adventure? I’m parting ways with my trusty car, and it’s been such a joy to drive! It’s in great shape, runs super smoothly, and has been really well-loved over the years. Whether you’re commuting to work or heading out on a weekend road trip, this beauty is ready to go. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself—I'm sure you're going to love it as much as I have!

Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean interior. Mechanically sound. Title in hand.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a premium driving experience for the discerning buyer. The exterior retains a high-gloss finish with only minor, negligible stone chips consistent with careful highway use. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free, featuring supple leather seating and a fully functional suite of electronics, including the original navigation and premium sound system. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health; it has been serviced strictly according to the manufacturer's schedule, with a recent oil change and brake inspection performed just last month. The engine runs smoothly, the transmission shifts seamlessly, and the tires have significant tread life remaining. This car is a reliable, turnkey option that has been treated with genuine care since day one. Includes a complete service history and both original key fobs.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive excellence, this vehicle has been maintained to an exacting standard. It exhibits a well-preserved exterior and a refined interior environment, ensuring a sophisticated driving experience. Mechanically sound and rigorously inspected, this offering represents an optimal balance of performance and prestige for the discerning motorist.
